memoryArtifacts.headline: Tomb marker of Owain Gwynedd (1100-1170) on outside wall, Bangor Cathedral, Wales
Coat of Arms after his time
memoryArtifacts.description:
There is no evidence Owain used a coat of arms during his life, but later antiquarians retroactively attributed to Owain Gwynedd the blazon: Vert, three eagles displayed in fess Or.

From Wikipedia source attached

popularStory.headline: Owain ap Gruffydd (d 1170) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/WALES.htm#Owaindied1170B
OWAIN ap Gruffydd, son of GRUFFYDD ap Cynan King of Gwynedd & his wife Angharad of Deheubarth ([1100]-1170).  He succeeded his fathe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales於1087年9月13日出生在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素時，他的父親King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys32歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain22歲。他於1124年與Gwladys ferch Llywarch在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年11月28日在威爾士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年83歲，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾班格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales于1087年9月13日出生在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素时，他的父亲King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys32岁，母亲Angharad ferch Owain22岁。他于1124年与Gwladys ferch Llywarch在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1170年11月28日在威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年83岁，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾班格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales was born on 13 September 1087, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales, his father, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, was 32 and his mother, Angharad ferch Owain, was 22. He married Gwladys ferch Llywarch in 1124, in Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 November 1170, in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 83, and was buried in Bangor, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales est né le 13 septembre 1087, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, son père, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys ferch Llywarch en 1124, à Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1170, à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Bangor, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.Caernarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wale: Caernarvon Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales am 13. September 1087 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys 32 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Owain 22. Er hat 1124 in Montgomeryshire, Wales Gwladys ferch Llywarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. November 1170 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales und wurde in Bangor, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales è nato il il 13 settembre 1087 nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Owain, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gwladys ferch Llywarch nel 1124, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 novembre 1170, nel Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Bangor, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain Gwynedd King of all Walesが1087年9月13日にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルで生まれた時，父King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysは32歳，母Angharad ferch Owainは22歳であった。1124年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでGwladys ferch Llywarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年11月28日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルで83歳で死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアバンゴルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(이)가 1087년 9월 13일 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1124년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Gwladys ferch Llywarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 11월 28일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 방어에 묻혔다.

pt.Caernarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wale: Caernarvon Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales nasceu em 13 de setembro de 1087, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Owain, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladys ferch Llywarch em 1124, em Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1170, em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Bangor, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales родился 13 сентября 1087 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys ferch Llywarch в 1124 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 ноября 1170 г. в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности бангор, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.Caernarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wale: Caernarvon Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales nació el 13 de septiembre de 1087, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gwladys ferch Llywarch en 1124, en Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1170, en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Bangor, Cardiganshire, Gales.
